description:
Trial Presentation Software

OnCue is the most reliable trial presentation software designed from the ground up by full-time trial presentation consultants.  Since 2014, OnCue has been used in thousands of trials of all sizes. OnCue is laser focused on creating the best presentation software available for the legal industry—simple workflows, powerful tools, blazing fast presentation.
23 fixes and 1 new feature since 4.5.1278

###What's New:

* New: Add beta release track to preferences UI
* Fixed: After searching all tabs from Notebooks, clearing search blanks the tree
* Fixed: PDFs may not be released from memory when no longer in use
* Fixed: Update caption for adding foldered media to include video
* Fixed: Error when entering hours when adding clips
* Fixed: Add clips popup can't handle zeroes for milliseconds
* Fixed: Adding exhibit sticker may fail with error: 'The process cannot access the file...'
* Fixed: When stickers are replaced they may get incorrect reference point set
* Fixed: Sticker custom settings should not be apply to all by default
* Fixed: Toolbar notebooks drop-down may lose disclosure caret if notebook is modified
* Fixed: Exhibit List - Show error if no label fields are selected.
* Fixed: ASCII transcript may fail to import if it includes timecodes
* Fixed: Deleting a transcript should delete any logs and backup files from the folder as well
* Fixed: CMS with line zero at the start will fail to import
* Fixed: Text import error is missing line number for invalid page/line
* Fixed: Transcript remains listed in sync tool after it is deleted
* Fixed: Condensed transcript report should have 'condensed' not 'standard' in the title
* Fixed: Error deleting transcript if xml is missing: Could not find part of the path
* Fixed: Replacing files may fail with error: One or more errors occurred
* Fixed: Error saving files: System.IO.IOException: Unable to remove the file to be replaced.
* Fixed: Improve licensing error when system time is incorrect
* Fixed: Fix accessibility features for updated Sec 508 ACR
* Fixed: Preferences dialog can't be fully navigated with keyboard
* Fixed: Bump System.Security.Cryptography to v9.0.15
